Lave Station

Mentions Timeline (8 articles)
3304-06-15
Lave Radio Network Campaign Concludes
The Lave Radio Network announces its campaign reached a successful conclusion. Scores of pilots delivered commodities to Lave Station, allowing the network to broadcast its annual conference across the galaxy. The rival Lave Jet Family campaign was unable to destabilise the initiative.
3304-06-14
Lave Jet Family Campaign Concludes
The Lave Jet Family announces its campaign to prevent the Lave Radio Network from broadcasting its annual conference has reached a successful conclusion. Scores of pilots supported the initiative by delivering commodities to construct a signal jammer, blocking Lave Radio's transmission.
3304-06-14
Lave Radio Network Campaign Concludes
The Lave Radio Network announces its campaign reached a successful conclusion. Scores of pilots delivered commodities to Lave Station, allowing the network to broadcast its annual conference across the galaxy. The rival Lave Jet Family campaign was unable to destabilise the initiative despite also receiving pilot support.
3304-06-10
Week in Review
Weekly summary covering the murder of INRA descendant Luca Hem by the League of Reparation, Aisling Duval hosting Jordan Rochester and Caspian Leopold's subsequent visit, the Lave Radio Network vs Lave Jet Family rivalry, successful conclusions of two starport repair initiatives, and the theft of the Youscape artwork from Garden City Gallery.
3304-06-08
Conflict in Lave
The Lave Radio Network announces plans to broadcast its annual conference from the Diso system and places an open order for commodities to be delivered to Lave Station. The Lave Jet Family responds with a rival campaign to construct a signal jammer to block the broadcast. Both factions set week-long operations to achieve their aims.
3304-05-17
Alliance Admiral Murdered by League of Reparation
Fleet Admiral Tulimaq Buchanan of the Alliance Council of Admirals has been murdered by the League of Reparation. His vessel was attacked en route to a naval ceremony at Lave Station. The League transmitted a message claiming the attack was due to Buchanan's ancestor being a senior INRA commander. Chief Inspector Kay Kilbride confirmed the investigation continues, with evidence suggesting League assassins are aided by sympathetic insiders.
3303-06-30
Galactic News Swainn's Appeal Concludes
Celebrated chef and bromatologist Dr Cordelius Swainn announced that his appeal for rare goods was enthusiastically received, resulting in a massive influx of deliveries to Lave Station for a forthcoming culinary event.
3303-06-23
Community Goal Renowned Chef Issues Appeal
Celebrated chef Dr Cordelius Swainn has issued an appeal for rare and exotic goods for a celebrity soirée in the Lave system.
